slides.title: Customization at Birth ⚙️
slides.content:
What if you want to name your player the moment you create them?

A **Constructor** is a special function inside the class that runs upon object creation.

slides.title: Using Constructors

quizData.question: What is the name of the constructor function in Dart?

options.text: The exact same name as the Class

quizData.explanation: A constructor must exactly match the name of its Class.
